title: cirsium × naegelianum
intro: Cirsium × naegelianum, also known as the Naegeli's thistle, is a hybrid species of thistle, resulting from the cross between Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium heterophyllum. The medicinal properties of Cirsium × naegelianum include its potential to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cirsium × naegelianum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
